---
name: Icon Request
about: Request a new icon or a variant of an existing one
title: "Icon request: "
labels: icon-request
assignees: ""
---

## Icon name
<!-- What should the icon be called? e.g. "Bell Filled", "Arrow Down" -->

## Description
<!-- What does this icon represent? What is it used for? -->

## Reference
<!-- Link to an existing icon from Lucide, Heroicons, Phosphor, etc. that matches what you need -->

## Variant of (if applicable)
<!-- Is this a variant of an existing cssvg-icon? Which one? -->

## Priority
<!-- How urgently do you need this? Nice-to-have / important / blocking -->

## Additional context
<!-- Any other details, screenshots, or links -->
